description: Configuration for mini scanner filtering rules. Kill patterns actively block signals. Shadow mode logs everything without filtering.

kill_patterns.reason: 0/11 WR live (Phase B pattern miner). Avg P&L -11.12%, MFE 0% — every trade went against immediately.

notes.kill_patterns: Signals matching these are REJECTED with reason=kill_switch. Also trigger contra_tracker to record inverted shadow trade.
notes.warn_patterns: Signals matching these pass but are flagged in Telegram/PWA with caution note. Not yet implemented.
notes.boost_patterns: Signals matching these receive score boost. Not yet implemented.
notes.shadow_mode: When true, all signals pass to journal regardless of rules. Used during initial data collection phase.
